title: Space Craft (Galacticraft)
body:
# About
Space Craft (galacticraft) is a modpack focused on the Galacticraft mod with the addons **More Planets** and **Galactic Research**. Remember that you need to use the **Galactic Research** items to **research the planets**. There are also some mods to help refine your experience, like **Mekanism, Refined Storage, and many others.**

[Gallery](https://modrinth.com/modpack/spacecraft/gallery)

This is my first modpack, so I hope you enjoy it. :)

## **Please do not repost this modpack without credit and my permission.**
